hero.title: Master Flutter & Dart Interviews
hero.description: Prepare for Flutter developer interviews with comprehensive guides on Dart, widget lifecycle, state management, platform integration, and real-world app architecture.

dart fundamentals.description: Learn Dart syntax, null safety, collections, async/await, streams, and OOP principles.

widgets & ui.description: Stateless vs Stateful widgets, build methods, constraints, layouts, and custom painting.

state management.description: Provider, Riverpod, Bloc, GetX, InheritedWidget, and choosing the right approach.

navigation & routing.description: Navigator 2.0, deep linking, named routes, nested navigation, and router delegates.

api & networking.description: HTTP requests, Dio, REST APIs, GraphQL, WebSockets, and error handling.

database & storage.description: SQLite, Hive, SharedPreferences, Drift, Isar, and local data persistence.

platform integration.description: Platform channels, method channels, native code (Kotlin/Swift), and third-party SDKs.

performance & testing.description: Rebuild optimization, memory leaks, widget/unit/integration tests, and CI/CD.

seo.title: Flutter & Dart Interview Preparation Guide
seo.description: Complete interview prep for Flutter developers: Dart programming, widget lifecycle, state management (Provider, Bloc, Riverpod), platform channels, performance optimization, and testing strategies.
